title: ISD Constituent Services | Boston.gov
content:
# ISD Constituent Services | Boston.gov

The Constituent Services team is composed of Call Centers, community liaisons, and the Investigation and Enforcement Team. Our team is responsible for responding to inquiries and facilitating the remediation of City code violations. We serve residents and business owners.

## Contact

- **Phone:** 617-635-5300
- **Email:** isd@boston.gov
- **Address:** 1010 Mass Ave., Boston, MA 02118
- **Office Hours:** Mon-Fri, 8 a.m. - 4 p.m.

## Getting Started

Whether you're new to Boston or a longtime resident, the Constituent Services team is here to help. From answering questions about inspections, permits, and safety regulations to connecting you with the right City department. Resources include a 2025 Move-In Checklist and Resident Guide Booklet.

## Sub-Divisions

### Call Center
The Call Center is generally the first point of contact for constituents to inquire about or seek services related to Inspectional Services.

### Investigative and Enforcement Team (I&E)
The team coordinates, and in some cases leads, the department's response to emergencies related to health, building, zoning codes or city ordinances.

## Partners

- Age Strong Commission
- Boston Fire Department
- Boston Police Department
- Boston Public Health Commission
- Neighborhood Services
